hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx|*.mjs) jq -n --rawfile c "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}/.claude/next-docs-map.md" '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",additionalContext:$c}}' ;; esac 2>/dev/null || true
hooks.statusMessage: Cargando mapa de docs de Next…
